subcodes.first_line: The vision of the world hath been illumined through the appearance of the Most Great Name, yet the peoples have denied, turned away and opposed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قر بصر العالم بظهور الاسم الاعظم ولکن الامم انکروا و اعرضوا و اعترضوا الا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
